overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player crosses a busy intersection, walks along a covered commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts, and stops at a street corner to observe traffic. The setting features futuristic architecture, holographic billboards, and diverse vehicles in an overcast urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with yellow crosswalk

events.description: begins crossing the wide intersection alongside other pedestrians
futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking across a broad yellow-striped crosswalk, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic in a dense urban core

notable_agents.action: woman in white jacket crossing while looking at a handheld device
futuristic silver sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive multi-story building with green facade and multiple holographic billboards
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow striping and red borders
large digital advertisement showing a woman's face on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban intersection with a prominent green skyscraper dominating the view. The camera moves steadily across a yellow crosswalk while pedestrians cross in various directions and futuristic vehicles navigate the intersection. The atmosphere is that of a bustling dystopian city center under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with commercial storefronts

events.description: steps off the crosswalk onto the sidewalk under a building overhang

agents.ego_description: walking along a covered sidewalk next to a busy street, passing neon-lit storefronts and street furniture

entered.detail: metal and glass canopy extending over the sidewalk from the building facade
orange-red fire hydrant with silver caps on the sidewalk corner
large pink utility box with traffic signal displays and warning stripes
commercial shopfront with glowing cyan and pink neon trim

segments.scene_description: Leaving the open intersection, the camera moves under a protective overhang along a commercial sidewalk. The environment shifts to a more enclosed space with neon-lit shopfronts on the right and a street barrier on the left. A distinctive red fire hydrant and pink traffic control box mark the transition point.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with pawn shops and electronics stores

events.description: passing by Big Ball Electronics store with distinctive red and green signage
passing the El Dorado Pawn Shop with prominent yellow signage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway, passing various commercial establishments including a pawn shop and electronics store

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: storefront with red and green neon signage reading BIG BALL ELECTRONICS
shop with yellow and black signage reading EL DORADO PAWN SHOP and wooden door

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the covered commercial walkway, passing distinctive storefronts including Big Ball Electronics and the El Dorado Pawn Shop. The sidewalk is relatively empty with only a few distant pedestrians visible. The overhang continues to provide shelter as the camera moves deeper into the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy street corner with heavy traffic flow

events.description: emerges from the covered walkway into an open street corner view
slows down and stops at the street corner to observe passing traffic

agents.ego_description: stopped at a street corner observing the flow of futuristic vehicles including sports cars and trucks passing by on the multi-lane road

notable_agents.action: green sports car with glowing accents driving past on the street
purple sedan moving slowly in traffic queue

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying EL GUAPO NEED FOR SPEED with wrestling imagery
multi-story white and glass building with horizontal architectural lines
elevated walkway or transport bridge spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens up to a busy street corner with a clear view of multi-lane traffic. The camera slows to a stop near a large El Guapo billboard while various futuristic vehicles including a green sports car and purple sedan pass by. A modern white office building rises on the left and an overhead bridge is visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, bustling urban intersection into a sheltered commercial corridor before emerging at a busy street corner. It begins by crossing a yellow crosswalk beneath a towering green skyscraper, moving through a crowd of pedestrians and futuristic vehicles under overcast skies. As the camera leaves the open intersection, the environment shifts into a more enclosed space, passing a red fire hydrant and pink traffic box to enter a covered sidewalk lined with neon-lit storefronts like Big Ball Electronics and the El Dorado Pawn Shop. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the overhang, slowing to a stop at a vibrant street corner dominated by a large El Guapo billboard. Finally, the view opens up to multi-lane traffic featuring a green sports car and purple sedan, with a white office building and a distant overhead bridge framing the futuristic cityscape.
